title: Ufa、Bashkortostan — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Ufa、Bashkortostan的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Ufa是Bashkortostan的一個城市，人口約1,120,000。The capital of Bashkortostan, a major industrial and cultural center in the Urals with a unique blend of Russian and Bashkir cultures.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
